user.title: Connect to Pianobar
user.description: Enter the connection details for your remote-pianobar instance.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Pianobar. Please check the host and port.

abort.already_configured: This Pianobar instance is already configured.

init.title: Pianobar Settings
init.description: Update the connection details for your remote-pianobar instance.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Pianobar. Please check the host and port.

love_song.name: Love song
love_song.description: Give the current song a thumbs up

ban_song.name: Ban song
ban_song.description: Give the current song a thumbs down (removes from station)

tired_of_song.name: Tired of song
tired_of_song.description: Mark current song as tired (temporarily skip)

create_station.name: Create station
create_station.description: Create a new station from the current song or artist

station_id.name: Station ID
station_id.description: ID of the station to rename

station_id.name: Station ID
station_id.description: ID of the station to delete

explain_song.name: Explain song
explain_song.description: Get Pandora's explanation for why the current song was chosen

get_upcoming.name: Get upcoming songs
get_upcoming.description: Get list of upcoming songs in the queue

set_quick_mix.name: Set QuickMix
set_quick_mix.description: Configure which stations are included in QuickMix

station_ids.name: Station IDs
station_ids.description: Array of station IDs to include in QuickMix

add_seed.name: Add seed to station
add_seed.description: Add an artist or song as a seed to an existing station

get_station_info.name: Get station info
get_station_info.description: Get station seeds and feedback history

station_id.name: Station ID
station_id.description: Station ID to get info for

delete_seed.name: Delete seed from station
delete_seed.description: Remove a seed from a station

delete_feedback.name: Delete feedback
delete_feedback.description: Remove a thumbs up/down from station history

get_station_modes.name: Get station modes
get_station_modes.description: Get available playback modes for a station

set_station_mode.name: Set station mode
set_station_mode.description: Set the playback mode for a station

query.name: Search query
query.description: Search term for artists or songs

get_genres.name: Get genre categories
get_genres.description: Get list of genre categories for creating stations

create_station_from_music_id.name: Create station from music ID
create_station_from_music_id.description: Create a new station from a search result or genre music ID

music_id.name: Music ID
music_id.description: Music ID from search results or genre list

add_shared_station.name: Add shared station
add_shared_station.description: Add a shared station by its numeric ID

station_id.name: Station ID
station_id.description: Numeric station ID from Pandora share link (digits only)

switch_account.name: Switch Pandora account
switch_account.description: Switch to a different Pandora account (disconnects current session and reconnects with the specified account's credentials)

account_id.name: Account ID
account_id.description: Account identifier as configured in pianobar config (e.g. "work", "default")
